arts.ttl: Man United looking to upset Liverpool with €50m move for Bundesliga talent
arts.sum: Man United have joined the race for Eintracht Frankfurt star Hugo Larsson who has been linked with a move away from the Bundesliga club in recent weeks. The German outfit have made a brilliant start to the 2024/25 campaign as Dino Toppmoller’s team currently sit second in the Bundesliga, four points behind league leaders Bayern […] The post Man United looking to upset Liverpool with €50m move for Bundesliga talent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Report: Bundesliga star 'agrees to join Liverpool' amid Trent Alexander-Arnold uncertainty
